prompt: A publisher audit notice arrives with thirty-day evidence deadlines. Which response strategy minimizes compliance exposure?
choices: Activate audit preparation workflows with entitlement provenance, reconciliation exports, and assigned remediation owners
Wait until fieldwork begins before gathering contract or allocation evidence
Delete under-licensed install records to improve dashboard compliance percentages
Convert all findings into catalog requests without audit traceability
explanation: Audit response strategies use pre-built entitlement evidence and governed remediation to defend license position under time pressure.

prompt: Two business units negotiate independently with the same publisher and create conflicting entitlement records. Which vendor management practice prevents duplicate spend?
choices: Centralize publisher relationship ownership with governed entitlement creation and contract references
Allow each unit to import identical PO lines without deduplication controls
Disable reconciliation for shared publishers until contracts expire
Track negotiated terms exclusively in email threads outside ServiceNow
explanation: Centralized vendor management ensures one source of purchased rights and consistent negotiation data across the enterprise.

prompt: License Workbench shows high true-up cost for one product family despite recent reclamation efforts. What should the SAM manager investigate first?
choices: Whether metric mappings, allocations, and normalization still reflect current contract terms after remediation
Whether catalog item descriptions mention the publisher name correctly
Whether MID Server heartbeat intervals match discovery schedules
Whether incident assignment groups include SAM analysts
explanation: Persistent true-up exposure after reclamation often indicates data integrity or metric misalignment rather than insufficient optimization effort.

prompt: Leadership sets a target to reduce publisher spend ten percent without increasing audit risk. Which optimization portfolio is most aligned?
choices: Reclamation of inactive installs, right-sizing renewals, and retiring unused entitlements before true-ups
Eliminating all reconciliation jobs until savings targets are met
Purchasing enterprise agreements for every title regardless of consumption
Suppressing compliance exceptions without documented acceptance
explanation: Spend reduction strategies combine reclamation, renewal right-sizing, and governed exception management to protect compliance posture.

prompt: Before renewing a volume agreement, which two analyses give finance the strongest negotiation data? (Choose two.)
choices: Reconciled over-licensed positions showing surplus entitlements available for reduction
Effective License Position comparing normalized consumption to purchased rights
Mean time to resolve unrelated infrastructure incidents
Discovery probe frequency by subnet without entitlement context
explanation: Renewal negotiations use reconciled position and over-licensed analysis to right-size commitments while maintaining audit defensibility.
